serena.$comment: Semantic code navigation and persistent project memories. Uses installed binary — NOT uvx (too slow, exceeds MCP timeout).

context7.$comment: Up-to-date documentation and code examples via Context7

sequential-thinking.$comment: Step-by-step reasoning for complex problems (UltraThink mode)

playwright.$comment: Browser automation for E2E spot-checks. Config in .playwright-mcp/config.json (tracked in git). Uses persistent Brave profile for login state.
